name: INVL Baltic Farmland, AB
summary: INVL Baltic Farmland, AB, together with its subsidiaries, invests in and leases agricultural land for farmers and agricultural companies in Lithuania. It owns 465 land plots covering the land area of approximately 2988.14 hectares. The company is also involved in the financing activity. INVL Baltic Farmland, AB was incorporated in 2014 and is based in Vilnius, Lithuania.
